-0.0307*(-sin(1.8163*x_2 - 7.3822) + 0.001*sinh(3.7945 - 5.2441*x_1) - 0.7285)**2 - 0.0001*exp(2.3995*x_1) + 0.0386*exp(0.5161*x_2) - 0.0203*sin(0.0357*exp(1.2423*x_1) - 1.754*sin(1.4007*x_2 + 7.9882) + 8.505) + 0.1938*tanh(2.2711*exp(1.3872*x_1) + 0.4461*sin(1.8325*x_2 - 4.0308) + 1.4312) - 0.6443

-0.0148*(-sin(1.8163*x_2 - 7.3822) + 0.001*sinh(3.7945 - 5.2441*x_1) + 0.3247)**2 + 0.0038*sin(5.1393*exp(1.3872*x_1) + 1.0094*sin(1.8325*x_2 - 4.0308) - 3.9365) - 0.3256*sin(0.0045*exp(2.3995*x_1) - 1.2827*exp(0.5161*x_2) + 9.2518) - 0.0716*tanh(-0.0193*exp(1.2423*x_1) + 0.9492*sin(1.4007*x_2 + 7.9882) + 1.1769) + 1.6434
